trace:
--- Round 1 --- The question asks for the company with the highest change in operating revenue compared to the previous reporting period. I need to find the operating revenue (营业收入) and its change from the previous period in this document. Looking at the document structure, section [2] "主要财务数据" (Main Financial Data) and specifically [2.1] "主要会计数据和财务指标" (Main Accounting Data and Financial Indicators) would likely contain the operating revenue figures. Section [5.1.2] "合并利润表" (Consolidated Income Statement) would also contain revenue data. Let me start by opening section [2.1] to see the main financial data. {"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.1","expected_evidence":"营业收入数据及其同比变化"} （一）主要会计数据和财务指标 公司是否需追溯调整或重述以前年度会计数据 □是 区否 |-|本报告期|上年同期|本报告期比上年同期增减（%）| |---|---|---|---| |营业收入（元）|1,192,456,727.58|987,449,350.03|20.76%| |归属于上市公司股东的净利润（元）|23,049,805.44|-26,222,417.80|187.90%| |归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益的净利润
（元）|12,016,299.06|-55,683,498.11|121.58%| |经营活动产生的现金流量净额（元）|134,010,794.82|-24,340,660.30|650.56%| |基本每股收益（元/股）|0.0131|-0.0149|187.92%| |稀释每股收益（元/股）|0.0131|-0.0149|187.92%| |加权平均净资产收益率|0.51%|-0.55%|191.85%| |-|本报告期末|上年度末|本报告期末比上年度末增减（%）| |总资产（元）|7,326,716,263.80|7,577,226,723.08|-3.31%| |归属于上市公司股东的所有者权益（元）|4,572,925,116.94|4,553,023,720.41|0.44%|（二）非经常性损益项目和金额 --- Round 2 --- I found the operating revenue data in section 2.1. The document shows: - 营业收入（元）: 1,192,456,727.58 (current period) - 上年同期: 987,449,350.03 (previous period) - 本报告期比上年同期增减（%）: 20.76% So for DOC1, the operating revenue change compared to the previous reporting period is 20.76%. This is the key evidence I need from this document. I should now stop and provide this evidence, as I have found the relevant information about operating revenue change for this company. Let me extract the verbatim evidence that shows the operating revenue and its change percentage. {"action":"stop","reason":"found operating revenue change data for DOC1"} ["营业收入（元）|1,192,456,727.58|987,449,350.03|20.76%"]
